narrative:
Van Wert County has 19,879 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.4% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -15.4% D−R vs -40.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
